description_long: This house features a modern, angular design with a mix of flat and slightly sloped roof sections, and a combination of gray and wood-textured exterior surfaces. The structure is composed of multiple interconnected volumes, creating a dynamic and irregular footprint. Large vertical and horizontal wall elements, some with cutouts and geometric accents, add visual interest and break up the facade. Windows are distributed asymmetrically, with some elongated horizontal openings and a few vertical strips, providing varied natural light entry. The entryway is set back and partially enclosed, with a prominent vertical wall element nearby, possibly serving as a visual marker or privacy screen. The overall appearance is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, angular house with gray and wood-textured surfaces, flat and sloped roofs, and asymmetrical window placement. The design features interconnected volumes and a partially enclosed entryway.
description_view_0: This view highlights the angular, multi-volume layout and the prominent vertical wall near the entryway, with a mix of gray and wood-textured surfaces.
description_view_1: From this side, the house's elongated facade and asymmetrical window arrangement are visible, along with the flat roof sections and a tall vertical accent wall.
description_view_2: This perspective shows the interconnected interior spaces, open areas, and the geometric cutouts in the walls, emphasizing the house's dynamic layout.
description_view_3: This angle reveals the rear and side volumes, additional window placements, and the overall irregular footprint of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with horizontal and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Partially enclosed entryway with a prominent vertical wall element, minimal overhang, and clean, geometric lines
